content_body: We celebrated Valentine's Day Early! On the first night, we explored the cabin and grounds, and enjoyed the hot tub. The folloing day, we watched movies, hiked and enjoyed the river, played air hockey, and spent time on the porch. Our last day there, we slept in, enjoyed the views, spent time in the yard with the fire pit, took photos by the river, and went for a drive. It was great to spend time together away!
title: New Couple Getting Away To Relax
